link_info.banner: TI ARM Clang Linker PC v4.0.0.LTS
link_info.command_line: C:\ti\ccstheia151\ccs\tools\compiler\ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.0.LTS\bin\tiarmlnk -IC:\ti\ccstheia151\ccs\tools\compiler\ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.0.LTS\lib -o main.out -mmain.map -iC:/ti/mspm0_sdk_2_00_00_03/source -iD:/CARDINAL LED-TEST FIXTURE v2/main -iD:/CARDINAL LED-TEST FIXTURE v2/main/Debug/syscfg -iC:/ti/ccstheia151/ccs/tools/compiler/ti-cgt-armllvm_4.0.0.LTS/lib -iC:/Users/Gowtham CS/Downloads/MSPM0G_Library/MSPM0G_Library/Debug --diag_wrap=off --display_error_number --warn_sections --xml_link_info=main_linkInfo.xml --rom_model ./adc_mux.o ./app.o ./control.o ./delay_timer.o ./ti_msp_dl_config.o ./startup_mspm0g350x_ticlang.o ./i2c_common.o ./main.o ./spi.o ./usb.o -l./device_linker.cmd -ldevice.cmd.genlibs -llibc.a -lMSPM0G_Library.lib --start-group -llibc++.a -llibc++abi.a -llibc.a -llibsys.a -llibsysbm.a -llibclang_rt.builtins.a -llibclang_rt.profile.a --end-group --cg_opt_level=2
link_info.title: Link successful
